scene.message: Ayase: Huh? Seems like we're{nl} one short...{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: It's glowing, but it's{nl} not warm.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Is everyone all right?{waitkey}What in the world was that...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Hwah?? What was that{nl} just now?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Stare at it too long{nl} and your eyes start to hurt.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I wonder what's changed?{nl} Let's go outside and see!{waitkey}{ret}
